terms.name: Certification
terms.definition: Evidence-backed verification of institutional capability

terms.name: Operational Readiness
terms.definition: Demonstrated preparedness across institutional domains

terms.name: Compliance
terms.definition: Continuous evidence-based adherence to policies and standards

terms.name: Evidence Registry
terms.definition: Immutable record of documents, tests, and approvals

terms.name: Validation
terms.definition: Repeatable verification of certification requirements

terms.name: Audit
terms.definition: Structured review becoming institutional memory

terms.name: Trust Framework
terms.definition: Explainable trust based on verified entities and evidence

terms.name: Renewal
terms.definition: Scheduled revalidation with historical archive

terms.name: Quality Gate
terms.definition: Deployment checkpoint with no bypass without authorization

terms.name: Launch Readiness
terms.definition: Governed checklist before production deployment

terms.name: Security Certification
terms.definition: Renewable security controls verification

terms.name: Accessibility Certification
terms.definition: Measurable accessibility compliance

terms.name: Localization Certification
terms.definition: Reviewable translation and terminology quality

terms.name: AI Governance
terms.definition: Human oversight and source attribution for AI capabilities

terms.name: Operational Confidence Index
terms.definition: Leadership index from readiness, compliance, and evidence

terms.name: Federation Certification
terms.definition: Coalition readiness with independent institution certification

terms.name: Continuous Compliance
terms.definition: Ongoing monitoring rather than annual reviews

terms.name: Certification Standard
terms.definition: Version-controlled requirements and validation procedures

terms.name: AI Certification Advisor
terms.definition: Advisory gap analysis without self-certification authority

terms.name: Executive Readiness Dashboard
terms.definition: Comprehensive operational readiness for leadership decisions
